title: Detailed Optimized
description: Client-side optimisation modpack with a few additional tweaks.
body:
[![Get help on discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9334b680c9a2f8a12f9b18274738c2ff6f33f43d.png)](https://discord.gg/VAN44pVDJB)



##  **1.20.5+ requires Java 21**. Update your launcher and [download Java here](https://adoptium.net/temurin/releases/?version=21&package=jre&arch=x64#version-filter).
A modpack for Minecraft based on Fabric, which focuses on performance and graphical improvements.

High performance
Detailed Optimized is generally better optimised than OptiFine, thanks to advanced performance modifications such as Sodium, Lithium and others!

On the OptiFine side
Detailed Optimized supports almost all OptiFine features, including shaders, merged block textures and zoom. 

I can confidently state that this is a well optimised modpack in terms of performance at the moment.

This modpack is made to increase fps and speed up loading worlds and improve RAM performance, but it's also made for convenience, such as Optifine features that Sodium doesn't have, or a mod that protects your Microsoft account on minecraft servers.

No Chat Reports will also be included in all 1.19+ versions to ensure the safety of the players' accounts!
